title: CI: attempt to fix flake in login test
body:
Fixes: #5212

...or at least I hope it does. The symptom seems to be that
INTEGRATION_ROOT is not being defined in some code flows.
This PR blindly implements a suggestion from Miloslav,
setting INTEGRATION_ROOT in one more place.

We won't actually know for a long time if this works or
not, because the test failure is a flake.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM
one test is failing and not many/any bread crumbs.
CI error was a timeout, no useful information. I simply pressed Re-run.
@mtrmac PTAL, is this the change you were suggesting?

> @mtrmac PTAL, is this the change you were suggesting?

Yes. As for reproducing the failure, running `ginkgo --nodes=$many` might help make it more likely.
